title: Multi-state drug bust: Ganja seized from container truck near Chennai
author: Unknown
key_facts: Officers of the NCB Chennai Zonal Unit, in coordination with the Telangana Police, carried out a multi-state operation on May 12.
A container truck was intercepted at the Nallur toll plaza near Chennai.
Contraband ganja was discovered concealed inside a specially designed false ceiling and hidden cavities in the vehicle.
The seized ganja was being transported from Malkangiri district in Odisha, allegedly headed for Madurai in Tamil Nadu.
The arrested persons are natives of Odisha and Bihar.
The seizure disrupted a major supply chain operating between Odisha-Andhra Pradesh and Tamil Nadu.
Efforts are still underway to apprehend the alleged mastermind of the network and owner of the seized vehicle, who has been traced to Odisha.
